items.summary: Add a global demo mode flag that can be activated from the StaffLoginScreen demo buttons (phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin). When demo mode is active, store the selected role and a `demoMode: true` flag in a context/state accessible throughout the entire StaffApp so all guarded features are unlocked.

In demo mode, bypass all GPS geofencing, GPS accuracy checks, mock-location detection, and speed-jump anomaly checks in PhlebotomistAttendancePage and AttendancePage. Instead of real GPS coordinates, inject a fixed mock coordinate (e.g. the configured lab location) so that geofence validation always passes.

In demo mode, bypass the device fingerprinting and device-binding enforcement on the attendance/shift pages. Skip the selfie capture step (or auto-accept it with a placeholder image) so the full shift start/end flow completes without a real camera.

In demo mode, bypass the ShiftGuard so phlebotomist routes that normally require an active shift (task queue, home collection queue, vitals, hospital samples, QR scan, etc.) are all accessible without first starting a real shift. Provide a simulated active shift in demo mode.

In demo mode, seed all data-dependent pages with realistic mock/stub data so every screen renders meaningfully rather than showing empty states. This includes: bookings list, home collection queue, hospital samples, reports list, audit logs, incidents, security logs, attendance history, and notifications.

In demo mode, all mutating actions (status updates, report uploads, vitals submission, camp QR scan, incident submission, billing edits) should optimistically succeed with a toast confirmation without making real backend calls, or gracefully handle backend failures without crashing.

Add a patient demo mode entry point on the PatientLoginScreen (or AppSelectorPage) so the Patient App can also be tested without Internet Identity. Patient demo mode should populate mock bookings, reports, home collection requests, vitals, and hospital samples.
